description: Platform-level behavioral anomaly and fraud signal framework. Products register domain-specific scoring models and rules; no product terms are built in.

defaultThreshold.description: Default fraud risk score threshold [0.0, 1.0] above which a transaction is flagged. Defaults to 0.75.

modelInferenceFallbackEnabled.description: Whether rule-based fallback is used when a remote inference model is unavailable. Defaults to true.

remoteInferenceEndpoint.description: URL of the remote ML inference endpoint. Must be an env reference when used in production, e.g. env:FRAUD_INFERENCE_ENDPOINT.

remoteInferenceApiKey.description: API key for the remote inference endpoint. Must be an env reference: env:FRAUD_INFERENCE_API_KEY.
